name: Peach Payments
description: Peach Payments — South Africa and East Africa payment gateway supporting cards, Ozow, SnapScan, and PayShap for online merchants.

seo.title: Peach Payments — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Peach Payments: Peach Payments — South Africa and East Africa payment gateway supporting cards, Ozow, SnapScan, and PayShap for online merchants.

when_to_use: Accepting cards and Ozow EFT for South African merchants
SnapScan and PayShap integration for East African checkouts
Recurring billing for South African subscription e-commerce

cons: Scaling beyond SA still in progress
review.verdict: Modern alternative to PayFast with richer local-method coverage, ideal for API-first African merchants.
review.best_for: API-first African merchants needing local methods beyond cards in SA and EA
review.not_for: Teams wanting the biggest SA plugin ecosystem or global reach
